reviews.comment:
Deben arreglar las puertas de los baños de damas no cierran, las sillas de la confitería rotas, y todo caro. Es en 400km la única estación de servicio y siempre mediocre. El personal de atención de carga combustible muy atentos

(Translated by Google)
They need to fix the women's restroom doors; they don't close. The chairs in the cafeteria are broken, and everything is expensive. It's the only gas station for 400 km, and it's always mediocre. The fuel attendants are very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZNk8zcDZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención lenta del playero pero los tiempos en el sur son otros, es común tener que esperar bastante tiempo para cargar.
Saliendo desde comodoro es conveniente parar acá, hay algunas opciones para comer a precios más elevados que en otras estaciones. Sándwichs de milanesa grande 250$, hamburguesa 180 $.

(Translated by Google)
The attendant's service was slow, but times are different in the south; it's common to have to wait quite a while to fill up. Coming from Comodoro Rivadavia, it's worth stopping here; there are some food options, though they're more expensive than at other stations. Large breaded cutlet sandwiches are $250, and hamburgers are $180.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvX29UVWxBRRAB
